// ============================================================
// CORVID 2.0 | managers/database/org-db
// Organisation record schema and operations.
// An org is any company or entity whose infrastructure
// has been touched or identified.
//
// Schema:
//   id      string    -  auto-generated e.g. "o_001"
//   name    string    -  company name
//   domain  string    -  primary domain e.g. "acme.net"
//   ips     list      -  known public IPs
//   notes   string    -  freeform notes
// ============================================================

OrgDb = {}
OrgDb.db = null

OrgDb.findByDomain = function(domain)
    matchDomain = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("domain") and record.domain == domain
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchDomain)
end function

OrgDb.findByName = function(name)
    term = lower(name)
    matchName = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("name") and record.lower(name).indexOf(term) != null
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchName)
end function

OrgDb.findByIp = function(ip)
    matchIp = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("ips") and record.ips.indexOf(ip) != null
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchIp)
end function

OrgDb.search = function(term)
    term = lower(term)
    matchAny = function(record)
        if record.hasIndex("name")   and record.lower(name).indexOf(term)   != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("domain") and record.lower(domain).indexOf(term) != null then
            return true
        end if
        if record.hasIndex("notes")  and record.lower(notes).indexOf(term)  != null then
            return true
        end if
        return false
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchAny)
end function

OrgDb.upsert = function(data)
    // Upsert by domain  -  domain is the natural key for an org
    if not data.hasIndex("domain") or data.domain.len == 0 then
        return Error.New("Organisation record requires a domain", "VALIDATION_ERROR")
    end if
    existing = self.findByDomain(data.domain)
    if existing.len > 0 then
        record = existing[0]
        id     = record.id
        if data.hasIndex("ips") then
            for ip in data.ips
                if record.ips.indexOf(ip) == null then
                    record.ips.push(ip)
                end if
            end for
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("name")  and data.name.len  > 0 then
            record.name  = data.name
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes") and data.notes.len > 0 then
            record.notes = data.notes
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    else
        id = self.db.nextId("o")
        record = {}
        record.id     = id
        record.name   = ""
        record.domain = data.domain
        record.ips    = []
        record.notes  = ""
        if data.hasIndex("name")  then
            record.name  = data.name
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("ips")   then
            record.ips   = data.ips
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes") then
            record.notes = data.notes
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    end if
end function

OrgDb.get = function(id)
    return self.db.get(id)
end function

OrgDb.all = function()
    return self.db.all()
end function

OrgDb.addNote = function(id, note)
    record = self.db.get(id)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    if record.notes.len > 0 then
        record.notes = record.notes + char(10) + note
    else
        record.notes = note
    end if
    self.db.set(id, record)
end function

OrgDb.New = function(db)
    result    = new OrgDb
    result.db = db
    return result
end function
